arts.ttl: Christmas comes late for ‘excited’ Graham Potter after landing West Ham job
arts.sum: The 49-year-old has not worked since being sacked by Chelsea in April 2023 and replaces Julen Lopetegui.

arts.ttl: “Didn’t sleep!” | Potter excited as he outlines vision for Hammers
arts.sum: Graham Potter has outlined his vision for West Ham as we start a new era under the Head Coach. The former Brighton boss spoke to the media for the first time, having been unveiled earlier this morning, ahead of taking training and preparing for our FA Cup match against Aston Villa tomorrow. “It’s a bit like... arts.ttl: Exclusive: West Ham now interested in signing 'unbelievable' Man United player on loan for Graham Potter
West Ham Transfer News: Hammers favourites to sign Chelsea outcast following Potter appointment
arts.sum: Graham Potter was finally announced as West Ham boss on Thursday morning. West Ham confirmed the worst kept secret in football on Wednesday as they relieved Julen Lopetegui of his duties with Potter b...

arts.ttl: Fresh Douglas Luiz transfer twist emerges after Aston Villa linked with surprise reunion
arts.sum: Aston Villa have been credited with an interest in bringing Douglas Luiz back to the club this month - just half a season after they bid an emotional farewell to the midfielder. Still only 26, he signed a five-year deal with Juve in the summer which runs until 2029 but a departure in January is likely after an underwhelming first half of the season; Luiz has been linked with a return to Villa as well as to another former side in Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Jaden Philogene to Ipswich, Enzo Le Fee to Sunderland, Diego Carlos to Fenerbahce
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Jaden Philogene to Ipswich, Enzo Le Fee to Sunderland and Diego Carlos to Fenerbahce.

arts.ttl: 29-year-old PSG star on top of his game offered to Aston Villa
arts.sum: Aston Villa are planning to make additions to their squad in the January transfer window. The Premier League side are struggling in the league this season and manager Unai Emery has some concerns in the defensive positions. arts.ttl: Graham Potter details West Ham talks and explains reason for 20-month football absence
arts.sum: Former Chelsea and Brighton boss Graham Potter has been appointed as the new manager of West Ham following the sacking of Julen Lopetegui, who'd only been in the job six months

arts.ttl: Jaden Philogene theory debunked and £84m Villa transfer decision proves why
arts.sum: For Hull last season, Philogene scored 10 times in 22 league matches from the left, compared with two goals in 10 starts on the right. Bailey has struggled for form due to niggling injuries and only scored his first goal of the season last weekend, yet Philogene has only started two of Villa’s 20 league games.
